leadText: Not to be confused with Yarn. The Yarn Ball (Japanese: けいとボール Yarn Ball) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Yarn Ball can be brought out during a picnic to be kicked around by the player and their party Pokémon.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A small ball of yarn. It's woven tight so as not to unravel, but even if it were to come undone, at least you could still use the yarn for something.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price S V $ 1,000 $ 250 Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Yarn Ball can be brought out during a picnic to be kicked around by the player and their party Pokémon. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A small ball of yarn. It's woven tight so as not to unravel, but even if it were to come undone, at least you could still use the yarn for something. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Picnic-Knacks ( Mesagoza Branch)
